Who I am

About Me

I'm PG. Jayant, a fresher with a deep interest in Machine Learning, Data Science, and AI. I love building solutions that extract meaning from data — whether that's training a sentiment analysis model, wrangling large datasets, or deploying cloud-based pipelines.

My toolkit spans the full ML lifecycle — from raw data processing with Pandas & NumPy to model building with Scikit-learn & XGBoost, and deployment via AWS. I'm also exploring Local LLMs using Ollama/Llama3.

I'm actively looking for opportunities where I can contribute, learn fast, and solve real-world problems with data.

What I've built

Projects

🧠

Text Classification of Drug-Related Content

Built a system to classify drug-related opinions from social media and doctor blogs, with a chatbot interface for users to query drug information. Supports role-based access for patients, doctors, and admins, with a sentiment dashboard to visualize drug opinion trends.

PythonVADERScikit-learnOllama/Llama3SQLiteNLP
View on GitHub →
📊

Estimation of Obesity Using Machine Learning

Predicted obesity levels from lifestyle and demographic data using machine learning — achieved 98% accuracy. Identified weight, height, and calorie intake as the strongest predictors through feature analysis.

PythonXGBoostScikit-learnPandasNumPySMOTE
View on GitHub →
☁️

Cloud Computing with AWS — Elastic IP Management

Demonstrated the use of Elastic IPs on AWS to maintain a stable, static IP environment for cloud deployments. Explored IAM and S3 configurations for secure and scalable cloud resource management.

AWS EC2S3IAMElastic IP
🛍️

AR-Enhanced Online Shopping Platform

Conceptual design for a shopping platform where customers can visualize products in AR before purchasing. Explored how AR technology bridges the gap between online browsing and in-store product experience.

FigmaCanvaARE-Commerce

Milestones

Achievements

🎬

PERASAI — 🥈 2nd Prize, Sathyabama Cultural Fest

2023

Throwback to 2023 — my first year at Sathyabama University! One of my earliest and most memorable achievements was participating in the cultural fest short-film competition, where I created "PERASAI", a film aimed at spreading awareness about living a drug-free life and guiding young teenagers toward better choices. As the Director and Writer, I had the opportunity to lead a passionate team, manage the entire creative process, and transform an idea into a powerful story.

🌱

🏅 Ranked 9th / 100 Teams — Mind Ease, SUSTAIN-AI-THON 2025

2025

Thrilled to share that we participated in SUSTAIN-AI-THON 2025 at VIT Chennai! During an intense 24-hour hackathon, my team and I built "Mind Ease" — a smartwatch-integrated mental wellness solution focused on real-time stress detection, AI-driven emotional support, and mindful guidance tools. Our goal with Mind Ease is to bridge the gap between technology and mental well-being, offering students proactive, accessible, and smart mental health support. A huge shoutout to my incredible team for their dedication, creativity, and teamwork throughout the challenge!
